sender.name: Yujia
sender.title: Co-founder
sender.company_description: a research platform based in Singapore, helping global institutional investors connect with industry professionals

type1_friendly.label: 友好建联
type1_friendly.description: 先加好友，连接后再说明目的。适合高价值/敏感候选人，转化率高但周期长
type1_friendly.connect_message: Hi {firstName}, I'm {senderName}, {senderTitle} of {company} — we connect global investors with top tech professionals. {highlight} — would love to connect!
type1_friendly.follow_up_after_connect:
Hi {firstName}, thanks for connecting!

We're supporting a research project on {topic_obfuscated}.

Would love to have a 60-min conversation with you — we offer a paid honorarium for your time ({rate_range}).

Feel free to share your preferred email and I'll send over the project details!
type1_friendly.tone: professional yet casual, no hard sell

type2_direct.label: 明确付费咨询
type2_direct.description: Connect note 一步到位：模糊课题 + 付费区间 + 60-min 1-on-1 匿名通话 + 对专家的高度认同（通过 highlight）+ 索取个人邮箱。适合找专家。
type2_direct.connect_message: Hi {firstName}, I'm {senderName} at Funda.ai (Singapore-based research + expert network). We're conducting a paid ({rate_range}) research on {topic_obfuscated}. {highlight} Do you have a personal email where I can send the formal invitation and honorarium details?
type2_direct.follow_up_after_connect:
Hi {firstName}, thanks for connecting!

We'd love to schedule the 60-min anonymous consultation on {topic_obfuscated}. The honorarium is {rate_range} for your time.

If you can share a personal email, I'll send over the formal invitation, project brief, and scheduling link.

Thanks!
type2_direct.tone: direct, expert-affirming, topic kept fuzzy via topic_obfuscated

type3_detailed_inmail.label: 详细背景版
type3_detailed_inmail.description: 完整自我介绍 + 平台说明 + 项目背景 + 付费邀请 + 邮箱请求。无字数限制，适合 InMail 或 type1/type2 接受后的 follow-up 长文。
type3_detailed_inmail.connect_message:
Hi {firstName},

I hope you're doing well. I'm {senderName} at Funda.ai (https://funda.ai), a Singapore-based platform combining AI-powered research and expert networks to deliver industry insights.

We're currently supporting a project on {topic_obfuscated}. {highlight}

We'd like to invite you to a paid ({rate_range}), 60-minute, one-on-one, anonymous call, scheduled at your convenience.

If this resonates, could you share a personal email so I can send the formal invitation and honorarium details?

Thanks!
{senderName}
type3_detailed_inmail.tone: warm, detailed, suitable for InMail or post-connect follow-up

sender_profiles._comment: 可选的 sender 身份切换。Phase 1.5 让用户在 Yujia / Zadie 之间选；不在此列的人需先在此添加。company / company_description / platform_url 是公司层面的固定信息，不可改。

project_config._comment: 每次寻访由 Phase 1.5 填写，作为模板变量注入。sender 字段是公司身份不可改；sender_profile_key 在 Yujia / Zadie 间切换；其他都是单次项目上下文。

personalization_rules.highlight_principle: 宁可概括，不要过细。一句简短的认可，避免暴露用户真正在追的具体技术/材料/节点。如果不确定怎么提炼，直接用 'Your expertise is exactly what we're looking for —' 这种纯概括版本。
highlight_sources: candidate's broad domain (e.g. 'BEOL', 'ML infra', 'gaming overseas') — 不要写到具体材料/技术/节点（如 Ruthenium / 2nm / specific framework）
candidate's company at high level (e.g. 'at TSMC', 'at Google') — 不要写到具体团队/产品
years of experience in the broad area
fallback：直接用 'Your expertise is exactly what we're looking for —'
highlight_examples: Your expertise is exactly what we're looking for —
Your background at TSMC caught my eye —
Your work in advanced node development is highly relevant —
Your 10+ years in semiconductor process is exactly the experience we need —
highlight_avoid_examples: ❌ 'Your BEOL work at TSMC is exactly the expertise...'（暴露 BEOL 这个具体方向）
❌ 'Your Ruthenium experience at imec...'（直接暴露课题材料）
avoid: overly long descriptions of the company
'I'd love to pick your brain' (too casual)
暴露真实研究课题的具体技术名/材料名/节点名/产品名

language_rules.use_chinese_when: candidate name/headline is primarily in Chinese characters

fixed_fields._comment: 明确不可修改字段，Phase 1.5 时向用户说明

configurable_fields._comment: Phase 1.5 时向用户确认/调整的字段
list: project_config.expertise（type3_paid_ask_email 用，可填空让 Claude 按候选人 Profile 自动填）
